title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: nmap bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for nmap is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The nmap packages provide a network exploration utility and a security scanner.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [enic] nmap scans fail with enic driver (JIRA:RHEL-40632)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for nmap is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The nmap packages provide a network exploration utility and a security scanner.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [enic] nmap scans fail with enic driver (JIRA:RHEL-40632)
